reviews.review_description: I lost track of time when playing this game. I can't wait to see what else they add to this. This game has alot of potential to be a very popular VR game. Great work by the development team.

This is a good and addictive little game the object is to shoot and match coloured blocks before they reach the top on some of the levels you get bombs to shoot to help you keep the blocks down also music is great to would recommend as it’s a game where you can jump in and out of quite easily..

The quick pace of the game and various levels and upgrades makes the replayability factor great. Nice refresh with simple gameplay rules and an urge to do more as you go through each level 👍 recommend!

I got this game a few days ago because it was free for a limited time, and I was way more hooked than I expected. It is a surprising mix between a shooting game, a strategy game and a music game (the blocks drop in sync with the music)
After each level you can pick a bonus (weapon upgrade or something else that will help you survive longer) and there are also challenges that unlock new weapons and upgrades when completed. The good thing is that you don't have to grind for hours to get them, it's more of a way to introduce new things progressively instead of overwhelming new players.

/!\ MESSAGE FOR THE DEVS
I think one of the challenges is bugged though ! (to get the column annihilator upgrade, you have to trigger bombs using a vertical bomb)
It's already the most annoying to get because you have to wait for a bomb and an horizontal bomb to be in the same column, but no matter how many times I do it my completion always indicates 0/30 so it's not taken into account) Could you please fix this annoying issue ?
Also, at the moments there are only 4 or 5 different musics I think, so I hope there will be a few more in the future 😊
It's one of my favourite games now, keep up the good work ! 😁
A mix of a puzzle and a shooting game, with a great soundtrack. Amazing and relaxing in the same time!

reviews.review_title: Got this gem ar black friday deal
reviews.review_description: Did not know this beauty of a game exist. Glad I add this to my collection.

This is a great puzzle shooter. Kind of a mashup of Match 3 puzzle games and target shooting. My one issue with the game is that the color blindness mode doesn’t really work for me. Most color based games are unplayable for me. But I have reached out to the devs with possible updates and updates and they are very responsive and receptive.

Update: New 360 Mode is absolutely superb. 

I must admit I had let this game fall down my playlist over time, not because it was bad, but just because in the world of VR games you are constantly wanting to try new games and you often forget about other games in the process.

Then I saw that this has had an update so I checked it out. 15 minutes later, VR Blast had rocketed back up to the top of my must play list.

The changes this game has gone through since I first played it are astonishing. It's so polished, well presented and insanely addictive.

There is potential here for multiplayer where two players occupy the same arena battling to get the most points or even co-op.

_______________

Very enjoyable. Look forward to the updates!

I've played this when it was first available and I the developers and continuously improving this game. It's changed so much and it's so much fun.

Great music, addictive gameplay and fun weapons, this is definitely worth buying.

Find us on Facebook - Group name "Ridoculus - Oculus Quest / SideQuest / App Lab"

This is a quite excellent Tetris/candy-crush like game where you shoot the bricks in vr to an excellent soundtrack. Only played 20 minutes so far. But will be going back.

Note: product received for free during a promotion. Not paid to make a review.

Just downloaded this game- another great find via the app lab store for the Quest 2. Great controls, nice visuals, awesome music and fun gameplay. Only played a few levels, but looking forward to master each level and chase a high score for each level. The developers are continuing to tweak the gameplay and add new features. I highly recommend supporting this game.

I received a copy of VR Blast from the developer via competition on Facebook. They have not paid me for a review. This review is solely my own thoughts and opinions. 

TLDR: A simple game with a great amount of replay value. The more you play. The more you unlock. Every run is different from the last one. Worth it at the price point. 

VR Blast is a simple game which has smooth graphics, a great soundtrack and a great difficulty ramp.

This review reflects the recent redemption update. I did play the game before the recent update and the update has brought dramatic improvement to the flow of the game. Quite simply you start a run. Choose a level and get to shooting. Enjoy the soundtrack and get ready to impress yourself when you make it that last leg which you thought was going to be your last. 

At the end of every level a random bonus is available which can improve weapons, gameplay mechanics or provide extra redemption. 

Good Points: 
Simple to play.
Great fun.
Challenging enough to keep it interesting but not so challenging it is off putting. 
Leader board function is a nice addition. 
Collectables which change how the core mechanics of the game work. 

Bad points: 
I couldn't find an option for colour blindness settings.

As stated earlier in the review I received this in a competition on facebook however had I dropped £8 on this I would have more than had my value from the game.

developer_response.body: Heya! We're happy to update that we have introduced a color-blind more to the game. We're still working on it and adding improvements but it's already out there with the new update, so you can find it if you update your version - and please come to our discord to tell us how it is and if it worked for you! https://discord.gg/yCwx4t3bwG

reviews.review_description: Played for half an hour. Short sessions of blockshooting sessions...music is great,gameplay is alright. Try to shoot the same colored blocks as soon as possible...they must not reach the sealing.
Got for free, kids LOVE playing it
I get the gest of the game but have to say, I don’t really understand all the different features or upgrades. Overall, just shoot and have fun!
Make sure to stick it out after the first couple levels. It seems REALLY slow at the beginning but thats on purpose. After you obtain some power ups the difficulty ramps up.
Enjoyable game, quick to get in and play. If you like tetris or breakout style games this is a definite play.

I really liked the game, felt like i dont want to stop. After a few games i realised i could go on for hours ;)
For now it has only single player. I wonder what its going to be like if they develop multiplayer!
Great game, guys!

My gameplay
https://youtu.be/s4w_E1w690w
(Copy and paste in your browser)

It is a quite fun and challenging puzzle game, preventing the blocks from reaching the top becomes more difficult in each phase, and it becomes a very entertaining task.

The music is pretty good and I think it's a great game.

They have also put a big update in the free Redemption update that improves the base game in everything and also adds many improvements such as new power ups, new blocks and score table among other additions.

If you like puzzle games you will not find another more original and fun.

A very addictive challenge !!

developer_response.body: Thank you for this review and thanks for sharing your gameplay!

reviews.review_description: way more fun than I thought!

This game is simple fun that is better than expected.  Shooting blocks to clear them looks and sounds silly, but once in the game it is a lot of fun.  There is enough variety to keep coming back regularly.  This has also become one of my go-to games when introducing people to VR.  Being a stationary shooter is comfortable to play.
